item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.2","is_repeated_local_repair":true,"same_means_type":true,"prior_repair_count":3,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"is_bounded_emergency_exception_request":true,"emergency_constraint_present":true,"repeated_bypass_unresolved":true,"post_exception_closure_required":true,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.96,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"Three earlier cache dispatches relied on handwritten release marks when the digital seal was unavailable"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"each addressed that day's shipment, while the authority for an offline release stayed unresolved"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"The pass will close tonight and the aid post has no cold-weather dressings left"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"Approve one manual release for this cache delivery"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"with the regional coordinator required to resolve the offline-release authority by 10:00 tomorrow"}],"abstain_reason":""}
